howItWorks.intro: This tarot probability calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: P(specific card in spread) = C(target, target) × C(remaining, other) / C(deck, drawn)
With reversals: each card has 2 orientations, doubling possibilities
P(all Major Arcana) = C(22, drawn) / C(78, drawn)
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What are the odds of drawing a specific tarot card?
faq.answer: In a 78-card deck, the probability of drawing one specific card in a single draw is 1/78 = 1.28%. In a 3-card spread, it's about 3.85%. For the Celtic Cross (10 cards), it's about 12.8%.

faq.question: What are the odds of drawing all Major Arcana in a spread?
faq.answer: For a 3-card spread from a full 78-card deck: the probability of all 3 being Major Arcana is about 2.1%. For a 10-card Celtic Cross spread, it drops to roughly 0.0001%.

faq.question: Does the math disprove tarot readings?
faq.answer: The math shows probabilities of random draws. Tarot practitioners view the cards as tools for intuition and self-reflection, not random predictions. The value lies in interpretation, not statistical probability.

faq.question: Is the Tarot Probability Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Tarot Probability Calculator?
sections.body: The Tarot Probability Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your deck size, cards in spread, specific cards to find, you get instant results including probability of drawing specific card, probability of all major arcana, probability of same suit. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting probability of drawing specific card right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your deck size and need to find the right probability of drawing specific card. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
